zh.Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, Uni: 英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利
zh.Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓
zh.Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP於1334年5月6日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓時，他的父親Thomas Aylesbury11331歲，母親Joan Basset20歲。他於1359年9月29日之前與Isabel Strange在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1409年12月7日在英國巴金哈姆爾享年75歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP于1334年5月6日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓时，他的父亲Thomas Aylesbury11331岁，母亲Joan Basset20岁。他于1359年9月29日之前与Isabel Strange在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1409年12月7日在英国巴金哈姆爾享年75岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Aylesbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aylesbury (Bucks) or possibly Aylesbeare (Devon).

variants.name: Elsbury
meanings: English: habitational name from Aylesbury (Buckinghamshire), from an Old English personal name Ægel (genitive Ægeles, Ægles) + burg ‘fortified place’ (dative byrig).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP was born on 6 May 1334, in Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Thomas Aylesbury, was 11331 and his mother, Joan Basset, was 20. He married Isabel Strange before 29 September 1359, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 7 December 1409, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP est né le 6 mai 1334, à Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Aylesbury, avait 11331 ans et sa mère, Joan Basset, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Strange avant 29 septembre 1359, à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1409, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England: Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP am 6. Mai 1334 in Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Aylesbury 11331 und seine Mutter Joan Basset 20. Er hat vor 29. September 1359 in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1409 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP è nato il il 6 maggio 1334 nel Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Aylesbury, aveva 11331 anni e il suo madre, Joan Basset, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Strange prima del 29 settembre 1359, nel Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 7 dicembre 1409, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, Uni: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリー
ja.Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ウエルドン
ja.Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインス
ja.lifeSummary: Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MPが1334年5月6日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ウエルドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Aylesburyは11331歳，母Joan Bassetは20歳であった。1359年9月29日以前にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスでIsabel Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1409年12月7日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで75歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP(이)가 1334년 5월 6일 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트 웰던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Aylesbury(은)는 11331세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Basset(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1359년 9월 29일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 Isabel Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1409년 12월 7일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England: Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP nasceu em 6 de maio de 1334, em Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Aylesbury, tinha 11331 anos e sua mãe, Joan Basset, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Strange antes 29 de setembro de 1359, em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1409, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP родился 6 мая 1334 г. в местности грит велдон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Aylesbury было 11331 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Basset, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Strange перед 29 сентябрь 1359 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 7 декабря 1409 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности буккингхамшир, Англия.

Se casó con Isabel Strange antes de 29 de septiembre de 1359, en Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1409, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
